verse_text: that I will take nothing of yours, from a thread to a sandal strap, lest you should say, 'I have made Abram rich'—

links.context: In imitation of Abraham ([[GEN.14:22]], [[GEN.14:23]]), and Elisha ([[2KI.5:16]]), Judith took nothing for herself, but dedicated all the property to the Lord.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
